User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

Memory.title: Memory
Memory.description: Represents a memory for a specific date, sentence, and AI generated art.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Memory entity (YYYY-MM-DD).

date.description: The date of the memory (one year prior).

sentence.description: The user-defined sentence associated with the memory.

aiArtUrl.description: URL of the AI-generated stick figure art.

reactions.description: An array of user reactions to the memory.

chatMessages.description: An array of chat messages for the memory.

UserMemoryReaction.title: UserMemoryReaction
UserMemoryReaction.description: Represents a user's reaction to a specific memory.

userId.description: The user ID who made the reaction.

reaction.description: The user's reaction to the memory (e.g., emoji).

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within the journal/chat conversation.

userId.description: The user who sent the message.

userName.description: The display name of the user who sent the message.

text.description: The content of the chat message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the message was sent.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. The userId must match the authenticated user's UID.

/memories/{memoryId}.description: Stores shared memories. Any authenticated user can read and write.
